# Test: apx lint for Avro schemas
# Verifies lint command works with Avro format (native Go, no external tools)

# Test lint on valid schema (should pass — native Go, no external tool needed)
exec apx lint --format=avro valid.avsc
exec apx lint valid.avsc

# Test lint on invalid schema (missing name)
! exec apx lint invalid.avsc
stderr 'missing required .name. field'

# Test lint on schema with duplicate field names
! exec apx lint duplicate.avsc
stderr 'duplicate field name'

# Test lint on schema with bad field naming
! exec apx lint bad_name.avsc
stderr 'camelCase'

# Test lint on schema with empty fields
! exec apx lint empty.avsc
stderr 'empty .fields. array'

# Test with non-existent file (should fail)
! exec apx lint /tmp/nonexistent_avro_12345.avsc

-- valid.avsc --
{
  "type": "record",
  "name": "User",
  "namespace": "com.example",
  "fields": [
    {"name": "id", "type": "string"},
    {"name": "userName", "type": "string"},
    {"name": "email", "type": ["null", "string"], "default": null}
  ]
}
-- invalid.avsc --
{
  "type": "record",
  "fields": [
    {"name": "id", "type": "string"}
  ]
}
-- duplicate.avsc --
{
  "type": "record",
  "name": "User",
  "namespace": "com.example",
  "fields": [
    {"name": "id", "type": "string"},
    {"name": "name", "type": "string"},
    {"name": "id", "type": "long"}
  ]
}
-- bad_name.avsc --
{
  "type": "record",
  "name": "User",
  "namespace": "com.example",
  "fields": [
    {"name": "id", "type": "string"},
    {"name": "user_name", "type": "string"}
  ]
}
-- empty.avsc --
{
  "type": "record",
  "name": "Empty",
  "namespace": "com.example",
  "fields": []
}
